item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
strip clubs aren't really my scene but this made me laugh
i guess
as is tradition
chimkin
i'm usually that friend
this is me right now
love all these guys but it's kinda true. moreso for walken and gottfried than freeman and goldblum imo
mmm hmm
unfortunately
that cantina chicken shit is good
I have absolutely zero idea what anything in this meme is talking about/referencing
the horror classic we all love
i'm a little scared
is there any other kind of corollance?
a big favorite as a lad
if you don't have one, yes you do because uncle cel is your friend
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: When Allyson Felix became pregnant,N¡ke was prepared to cut the terms of Felix's endorsement by as much as 70% due to the pregnancy, and told her to “know your place and just run.” Amid all of this, she was forced to have an emergency c-section
item.description: When Allyson Felix became pregnant, N¡ke was prepared to cut the terms of Felix's endorsement by as much as 70% due to the pregnancy, and told her to “know your place and just run.” ? Amid all of this, she was forced to have an emergency c-section seven months into her pregnancy because of a potentially life-threatening condition and her baby had to live for more than a month in the NICU. But two years later she’s qualified for her fifth Olympics with her daughter watching. Felix dropped N¡ke and created her own brand of running shoes, the Saysh One. She used running in the Olympics in Japan wearing them under the banner “I Know My Place”. With 11 medals now, she passed Carl Lewis this summer for the most track and field medals by an American in history! "I used my voice and built this company for you. So that you never have to train at 4:30am while you're 5 months pregnant to hide your pregnancy from your sponsor.”

oh no
monch monch monch

it is urgent.

yeah

YOU KNOW WHAT THEY DID

item.title: MRW I get a message from the mods warning me not to post any Intergalactic Quality on the weekend because the servers need that time to recover.
item.description: Source: This is a historic clip for the music industry. Those of you who don’t know, the gentleman singing is Mexican singer Chalino Sanchez. In the beginning, you can see him holding a note that he’s visibly reading in this video. The note is said to have been a death threat for performing in Sinaloa, MX after he had been warned not to. This was his last concert and the last footage of him alive as the following day his body was found bound with two gunshots to the head. This man knew his time was limited, regardless he performed as promised and gave the crowd what they paid for. It ultimately cost him his life. RIP Sorry for the poor quality the original is pretty rough too. #IntergalacticQualityGifs (Check WiFi)
item.dc:creator: BabyFarkMcGeeZax

item.title: Silmarillion – the two Lamps of the Valar
item.description:
This is a lore account on how the world first received light from Illuin and Ormal, two giant lamps, and how their destruction reshaped Earth (art by Andrey Maximov).
Before anything else was Eru Ilúvatar, the One. He first created spirits known as the Ainur, and on behalf of Ilúvatar the Ainur shaped the physical universe. The Ainur created stars and planets and finally Arda, that is Earth; and they prepared Arda to be the home for Elves and Men to come. But, it is told, it had not yet the sun or moon.
The greatest of the Ainur the Elves called the Valar. Among the mighty Valar were the spouses Aulë and Yavanna. Aulë was a master of all crafts and materials of Earth, he shaped mountains and the basins of the seas, while Yavanna brought forth and cared for the plants and animals (art by Viktoria Sinner).
The mightiest of all Ainur was Melkor, later known as Morgoth, but he lost his place among the Valar for he desired tyranny and became the original Dark Lord. Long before the Elves awoke Melkor marred the symmetry the Valar tried to create, and only when all united his peers could drive him away from Arda (art by Marco Bartolini).
"In that time the Valar brought order to the seas and the lands and the mountains, and Yavanna planted at last the seeds that she had long devised. And since, when the fires were subdued or buried beneath the primeval hills, there was need of light, Aulë at the prayer of Yavanna wrought two mighty lamps for the lighting of the Middle-earth which he had built amid the encircling seas." – The Silmarillion; III; I onwards (art by Amy O'Hanlon)
Then Varda, the Queen and Star-kindler, filled the lamps and Manwë, King of the Valar, "hallowed them, and the Valar set them upon high pillars, more lofty far than are any mountains of the later days. One lamp they raised near to the north of Middle-earth, and it was named Illuin; and the other was raised in the south, and it was named Ormal; and the light of the Lamps of the Valar flowed out over the Earth, so that all was lit as it were in a changeless day" (art by Ted Nasmith).
The myths tell how the world then was far more symmetrical, and that flora and fauna were richest in the middle of the Earth where the lights of the Lamps blended: "And there upon the Isle of Almaren in the Great Lake was the first dwelling of the Valar when all things were young, and new-made green was yet a marvel in the eyes of the makers; and they were long content."
But Melkor returned and looked down upon Earth, and the beauty of its Spring filled him the more with hate (art by Elena Kukanova). "Now therefore the Valar were gathered upon Almaren, fearing no evil, and because of the light of Illuin they did not perceive the shadow in the north that was cast from afar by Melkor; for he was grown dark as the Night of the Void."
With his host of lesser Ainur spirits Melkor came to Middle-earth far in the north. He delved the underground stronghold of Utumno; and the Valar became aware of his return when plants rotted or grew poisonous, and beasts turned into monsters and dyed the earth with blood. The Valar were however unaware of the main target of the Dark Lord, as they sought for him (art by Gnome-the-artist).
Finally "Melkor, trusting in the strength of Utumno and the might of his servants, came forth suddenly to war, and struck the first blow, ere the Valar were prepared; and he assailed the lights of Illuin and Ormal, and cast down their pillars and broke their lamps. In the overthrow of the mighty pillars lands were broken and seas arose in tumult; and when the lamps were spilled destroying flame was poured out over the Earth" (art by Murgen).
"And the shape of Arda and the symmetry of its waters and its lands was marred in that time, so that the first designs of the Valar were never after restored." The Valar could not at that time overcome him, for the greater part of their strength was needed to restrain the tumults of the Earth, and to save from ruin all that could be saved of their labour; and afterwards they feared to rend the Earth again, until they knew where Elves and Men were to awake (art by Dmitry Isakevitch).
"Thus ended the Spring of Arda. The dwelling of the Valar upon Almaren was utterly destroyed, and they had no abiding place upon the face of the Earth. Therefore they departed from Middle-earth and went to the Land of Aman, the westernmost of all lands upon the borders of the world;" On the contient of Aman (red) most of the Valar made their new home at the center; it was called Valinor, the Blessed Realm, where later the Elves would sail.
The legends tell that after the Lamps were lost two great Trees were grown in Valinor which gave light to that land, while Middle-earth lay in darkness. But near the end of the First Age Melkor deviced the death of the Two Trees, whence the Valar created the Sun and the Moon (art by Amy O'Hanlon).
Some related accounts (art by Freydoon Rassouli): The Valar https://imgur.com/gallery/NgivE1Z Morgoth https://imgur.com/gallery/pogRoXS Astronomy demythologized https://imgur.com/gallery/VSGjxFR
For more Tolkien lore posts, enjoy my indexes: Character bios https://imgur.com/gallery/axV2mPF Folks, animals, items, etc https://imgur.com/gallery/AQK9pJL
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: UK rappers open new supermarket to help minorities 'feel seen' | REUTERS
item.description: Award-winning rap duo Casyo Johnson and Karl Wilson (Krept and Konan) are set to open a new supermarket to help ethnic minorities ‘feel seen.’ Shoppers will be able to bulk-buy halal meat, exotic fish and fruits, as well as ethnic hair and beauty products. Read the story here: https://reut.rs/3EgsUZz
item.dc:creator: smallteam
